name: Frolic Silicon O-Ring Set
summary: Frolic Silicon O-Ring Set — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Replacement silicone seal set for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, developed to preserve airtight connections, stable airflow, and long-term device performance. The Frolic Standard Silicone O-Ring Set provides factory-spec replacement seals for the Frolic Thermal Extractor. These precision-moulded silicone rings are intended to replace worn or compressed originals, helping restore proper airflow regulation, secure accessory fitment, and consistent vapour output. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
